de549c1592a62c129b8d49c8c0137aa6859b103f; 2f3efe44083af91cef562c1a3451eee2f8601d22; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 7d8905a1fd288068f12c8347caeabefd36d0dd6c; 352420ee61a8da783ca7750170793613b18b8d9c; 8d36a67a6d7571f4dfd88c8f2df21f97de10eb4d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 354dcdebf3f8b5feeed5c62090e0bc1f0c28db06; 8793066d170b6a742c4fcdb478d4f100c1e4bf17; cac8c4f79077c74aa059d1c58c021be1c89f1178; 5d10a5fcc943afab50bce6293eaaaf3d22815868; 581a6f3f034a4589d28c6232e2ffdf05643ded28; 44117a9560b2469236042b6e82628bf3ad6d6723; 018e943ba0452b05edd903c3eaf746068ebca138; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; 23525374cfd3af714f3ffb7a203b1ef3253333fe; 966852963a88a28786b798c91b6662d6e501e590; 35a17f896847614a71df772bbe2b66ae231cabc7; 54a8b153ed04a872da878d695239bdc413dc782c;   - How Tool Learning | papers: 3597c2eff349260c59e7cb2bff31a31db5cf50fc; 6867e65205548c31e0832d41e5d3c511ea0d4db5; 288e7224d53d68669eb67f2496e068dc965c639e; ded3266d047b36a963c1324aa9f98705d598bdcf; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 3eb25b4eb27808f9a6c619cdcd764140d691dea8; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; d9fbf374536d625667341ed8a2616cd698ee628b; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; ccbca16fe7c6b12ffca2af1893450855ad106bc8; 79e7ead8f59b17431de2b86af10dc0c30a1f5a2b; 050be0010b4625a9b7ed2c77bd1a48d3c618468e; 8fb92f51434543c4a8cd4980f84cf04552c712cc; 38179848e2d6a3ad373b1793848816111428ac36; 1df72f625cef4a4a3b60d926890f8382b1b958fb; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 264c5cea78011bbadd1757f6a81d65edafc8fdd2; b9e8b62bcc019f47a0a015568f70039b3b7c1196; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; ff61aef2fef3a235bfaa123158a990c4f5f27d1a; b3d86acd1bae52b92b14e5253a3a5bb8a3a3f8da; 7785760e4fb60dc03e56014ecb60aa53c2d1d2cd; 29a3c6968888d8078d21ff5b7d9e6d78c470fdb0; 4deed74a3eee7e629dce2b8ef1e437ca74b2e64a; 4f4a409f701f7552d45c46a5b0fea69dca6f8e84; a1426b13b74dbad17b34606d25aabe1d61f6e11a; ec3f53efda752e176ce80f2c50b90ec1f6f3dfb3; 3b36d16985286b03e06e8404a7be49a9713d37b9; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 24a56d41df2c939c3223bde7bf26050302c3dea7;       - Tool~ Learning~ with~ LLMs | papers: bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; ac2fc8c5d4a1f44464f1415ea3dd3ed45398b9d9; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e; de549c1592a62c129b8d49c8c0137aa6859b103f; 2f3efe44083af91cef562c1a3451eee2f8601d22; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 7d8905a1fd288068f12c8347caeabefd36d0dd6c; 352420ee61a8da783ca7750170793613b18b8d9c; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; 07b14c24833400b79978b0a5f084803337e30a15; 455866ca838f356b53a7e3e5b344834f9e93dbbc; b3848d32f7294ec708627897833c4097eb4d8778; f0888b9c0ef63e68c7758e6aec2370961c0eede9; 8d36a67a6d7571f4dfd88c8f2df21f97de10eb4d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 354dcdebf3f8b5feeed5c62090e0bc1f0c28db06; 8793066d170b6a742c4fcdb478d4f100c1e4bf17; cac8c4f79077c74aa059d1c58c021be1c89f1178; b6ca4b1bee98f4317dd25c764a8057e6ef11c89e; ab12d8c5e607d702f2fc02ea711960509f9ec1a9; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; 6e754273d54a91371efbc928cd6b156364d517da; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; 7af1ae7db05482a2d580ba1173d415679a9dbae9; 3597c2eff349260c59e7cb2bff31a31db5cf50fc; 6867e65205548c31e0832d41e5d3c511ea0d4db5; 288e7224d53d68669eb67f2496e068dc965c639e; ded3266d047b36a963c1324aa9f98705d598bdcf; 3eb25b4eb27808f9a6c619cdcd764140d691dea8; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; d9fbf374536d625667341ed8a2616cd698ee628b; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 38179848e2d6a3ad373b1793848816111428ac36; 1df72f625cef4a4a3b60d926890f8382b1b958fb; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 264c5cea78011bbadd1757f6a81d65edafc8fdd2; b9e8b62bcc019f47a0a015568f70039b3b7c1196; ff61aef2fef3a235bfaa123158a990c4f5f27d1a; b3d86acd1bae52b92b14e5253a3a5bb8a3a3f8da; 7785760e4fb60dc03e56014ecb60aa53c2d1d2cd; 29a3c6968888d8078d21ff5b7d9e6d78c470fdb0; 4deed74a3eee7e629dce2b8ef1e437ca74b2e64a; 4f4a409f701f7552d45c46a5b0fea69dca6f8e84; 493bc1ea655b9c6450a951a28d67c157e4712ce9; 93d63ec754f29fa22572615320afe0521f7ec66d; 47ced790a563344efae66588b5fb7fe6cca29ed3; 4f09e6ec1b7d4390d23881852fd7240994abeb58; c9b8593db099869fe7254aa1fa53f3c9073b0176; a1426b13b74dbad17b34606d25aabe1d61f6e11a; ec3f53efda752e176ce80f2c50b90ec1f6f3dfb3; 3b36d16985286b03e06e8404a7be49a9713d37b9; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 24a56d41df2c939c3223bde7bf26050302c3dea7; 910fcfd759b0eba01b5744e84d5d2355ed618531; b3dae5011b9b44b861f884b2b788f2fc9bf59a4e; 57cbb0578326ed792d03981ca701214844462d22; 7919cb1a1dcf70ed7803c43a71d43dba696ef149; 966ba2acfe0700c2410efe15ed1b6c25340b7a95; bf21281f3faba32b275012bc90b10e7e988b8867; 97afc428341eca1011a142daf269c9b01230f410; 311b5c770738fabc940b3b630664d562916df83c; ae4635297ad87fcb3ec4105a51b5cbcb4075e5e2; b458fc5261595f44b36325e5eaea1f874d65138f; 354bf043179e3e9f05df73e3f04517e53c326d1f; 23af54b82c951317f1fc1841164d8a441a2d8120; 45ea1b47195d3d381e4b08f8cc0be3568c780ea9; 3bf191c152c3eb693f2fe22eda99197516da9db3; 5a9f79660472e894e482bae011c122f35f9a5095; 19c222d1f18317d58cc85491f37479bc0dc49f41; c8a5e1b37c448b0e17720b3c4e65d5b36c695638; 3268c1a172d6e6aa3769b7e9aebdebbd630bc64f; 19430ba54cc873dc5061bb53601fc576486d5a3c; 47440dfd5444fe03ef1ffd97f88101f69c4c6628; 94e17ccf5f999689788ba072d8fafa42fe073333; e43f35401ad1f7bed8058a681c464ac79adc8671; d58ca6c8918777b36bda2969280a4f262d2b835d; d6beb9cc394f1e2046371678737346f05270ca91; 9f25324c89686495afb697cdb79f98d79092b843; c8eee9766f0968e8f1b1be0731bc70b85be0ac97; 46c8b29aae1dd0db7ffec682d10cc53ee0fbbcac; 8490234d79b47e459824dcf87c1e288211a3c964;         - Tuning-based Methods | papers: 050be0010b4625a9b7ed2c77bd1a48d3c618468e; 8fb92f51434543c4a8cd4980f84cf04552c712cc; 38179848e2d6a3ad373b1793848816111428ac36; 1df72f625cef4a4a3b60d926890f8382b1b958fb; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 264c5cea78011bbadd1757f6a81d65edafc8fdd2; b9e8b62bcc019f47a0a015568f70039b3b7c1196; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; ff61aef2fef3a235bfaa123158a990c4f5f27d1a; b3d86acd1bae52b92b14e5253a3a5bb8a3a3f8da
        - Tool Calling | papers: 288e7224d53d68669eb67f2496e068dc965c639e; b3dae5011b9b44b861f884b2b788f2fc9bf59a4e; 966ba2acfe0700c2410efe15ed1b6c25340b7a95; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; bf21281f3faba32b275012bc90b10e7e988b8867; 97afc428341eca1011a142daf269c9b01230f410; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c; 311b5c770738fabc940b3b630664d562916df83c; 57cbb0578326ed792d03981ca701214844462d22; 7d8905a1fd288068f12c8347caeabefd36d0dd6c; 7919cb1a1dcf70ed7803c43a71d43dba696ef149; ae4635297ad87fcb3ec4105a51b5cbcb4075e5e2; b458fc5261595f44b36325e5eaea1f874d65138f
        - Expertise Enhancement | papers: 3e5a8f454b0d5b642281f0a895b5e16aa702d885; 6c943670dca38bfc7c8b477ae7c2d1fba1ad3691; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; 2c4bf56c5b1a1f06ee3ca21ce964ba2c8c66cb2c; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; 7150e17eac46cfdfc303ceef882d115e0232de46; b272513916b45c8517d289d7abee4a53e6832187; 57100e39d0413ee585b381ba9ab366e8a6cf2866; 2502311c66b11b3d5551e13a0095f2b1a5c5455d; 20001c5ec86ce60032b12a369f219c9db16dbe7b; 05e003a34148d4663734d3f39deefa0979d2a0e6; c79a04da127d6ff28c19c5dc35feb01feaf3d2b9; 1bcde55995a957b3e8a595d536b816cb8989cf1d; 8d36a67a6d7571f4dfd88c8f2df21f97de10eb4d; 170c97c7215f42edfb20c2248f954879e91ef86e; 354dcdebf3f8b5feeed5c62090e0bc1f0c28db06; 8793066d170b6a742c4fcdb478d4f100c1e4bf17; cac8c4f79077c74aa059d1c58c021be1c89f1178; 5d10a5fcc943afab50bce6293eaaaf3d22815868; 581a6f3f034a4589d28c6232e2ffdf05643ded28; 44117a9560b2469236042b6e82628bf3ad6d6723; 018e943ba0452b05edd903c3eaf746068ebca138; 12b233752c7097ea6525622bed238ae2d2193c5a; e5dd227a581718a39c83023756802c522f2b4ad3; 3793a5f435fef59a901f5ba0d8ef43df88d97161; 587f22e4e04d77ba0750deea69192fbfb73d7435; c86a70ff639707e647da3a429fe8e1e5c04415f5; b5bb10b374b52a830e96e3c427d8486def7d882c
          - Tool Selection | papers: 7785760e4fb60dc03e56014ecb60aa53c2d1d2cd; 29a3c6968888d8078d21ff5b7d9e6d78c470fdb0; 4deed74a3eee7e629dce2b8ef1e437ca74b2e64a; 4f4a409f701f7552d45c46a5b0fea69dca6f8e84; 493bc1ea655b9c6450a951a28d67c157e4712ce9; 93d63ec754f29fa22572615320afe0521f7ec66d; 47ced790a563344efae66588b5fb7fe6cca29ed3; 4f09e6ec1b7d4390d23881852fd7240994abeb58; c9b8593db099869fe7254aa1fa53f3c9073b0176; a1426b13b74dbad17b34606d25aabe1d61f6e11a; ec3f53efda752e176ce80f2c50b90ec1f6f3dfb3; 3b36d16985286b03e06e8404a7be49a9713d37b9; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; 24a56d41df2c939c3223bde7bf26050302c3dea7; 910fcfd759b0eba01b5744e84d5d2355ed618531; b3dae5011b9b44b861f884b2b788f2fc9bf59a4e; 57cbb0578326ed792d03981ca701214844462d22; 7919cb1a1dcf70ed7803c43a71d43dba696ef149; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; f0888b9c0ef63e68c7758e6aec2370961c0eede9; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d
      - Benchmarks | papers: 45ea1b47195d3d381e4b08f8cc0be3568c780ea9; 3bf191c152c3eb693f2fe22eda99197516da9db3; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e; 5a9f79660472e894e482bae011c122f35f9a5095; 19c222d1f18317d58cc85491f37479bc0dc49f41; c8a5e1b37c448b0e17720b3c4e65d5b36c695638; 7d8905a1fd288068f12c8347caeabefd36d0dd6c; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; 3268c1a172d6e6aa3769b7e9aebdebbd630bc64f; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; 455866ca838f356b53a7e3e5b344834f9e93dbbc; 19430ba54cc873dc5061bb53601fc576486d5a3c; 47440dfd5444fe03ef1ffd97f88101f69c4c6628; 94e17ccf5f999689788ba072d8fafa42fe073333; f0888b9c0ef63e68c7758e6aec2370961c0eede9; e43f35401ad1f7bed8058a681c464ac79adc8671; d58ca6c8918777b36bda2969280a4f262d2b835d; d5676076ac122b8767126e76cb3a1867e1e50741; 66eae99f971b8dc3b3fd83e335848d9c95594bb5; 7738e909d563d84fbd4ab5cb6aacf62c84fe2ab9; ab12d8c5e607d702f2fc02ea711960509f9ec1a9; 60126292c0b31dfc8628d99001e057b9f8355000; 493bc1ea655b9c6450a951a28d67c157e4712ce9; 0a893657e00fe8ecfadcc65c63bf293e70cb1564; b3d86acd1bae52b92b14e5253a3a5bb8a3a3f8da; d6beb9cc394f1e2046371678737346f05270ca91; 9f25324c89686495afb697cdb79f98d79092b843; c8eee9766f0968e8f1b1be0731bc70b85be0ac97; c12b80b44d9acfe6cd92fdf965264c4b706c367c

    - Why Tool Learning~ | papers: bcdaf6c98ddbd6809cf6241aa77200d7394db163; ac2fc8c5d4a1f44464f1415ea3dd3ed45398b9d9; c7a3f9cc61cfafdc307f8ae24430b6b1121f9b2c; b1c9c455acb1393f1bf60ec4095ee343531e404e;       - Task Planning | papers: 3597c2eff349260c59e7cb2bff31a31db5cf50fc; 6867e65205548c31e0832d41e5d3c511ea0d4db5; 288e7224d53d68669eb67f2496e068dc965c639e; ded3266d047b36a963c1324aa9f98705d598bdcf; 0d42221038c05cee8443c5b5af838505ee137dc3; 3eb25b4eb27808f9a6c619cdcd764140d691dea8; 5ce94181ea702f69c3651dce721d6bd8026b8106; d1120d67b700e4dfe8b39eb1e48fbdea4e1a0c43; d9fbf374536d625667341ed8a2616cd698ee628b; ed9943d73eb42116fe33564b5065c78b5ca0b16e; 1b6e810ce0afd0dd093f789d2b2742d047e316d5; 99832586d55f540f603637e458a292406a0ed75d; ccbca16fe7c6b12ffca2af1893450855ad106bc8; 79e7ead8f59b17431de2b86af10dc0c30a1f5a2b; 050be0010b4625a9b7ed2c77bd1a48d3c618468e; 8fb92f51434543c4a8cd4980f84cf04552c712cc; 38179848e2d6a3ad373b1793848816111428ac36; 1df72f625cef4a4a3b60d926890f8382b1b958fb; 33eed6ea6805b59617fed7c41ef5825b5e4d1621; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; 264c5cea78011bbadd1757f6a81d65edafc8fdd2; b9e8b62bcc019f47a0a015568f70039b3b7c1196; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; ff61aef2fef3a235bfaa123158a990c4f5f27d1a; b3d86acd1bae52b92b14e5253a3a5bb8a3a3f8da
